title: V7HandoffPackage
description: The delivery artifact from AlphaForge to V7 acceptance gates. Bundles all evidence V7 needs to evaluate an alpha candidate. Owned by AlphaForge; accepted/rejected by V7.

v7_gate_mapping.description: Mapping of AlphaForge evidence to canonical V7 promotion gates G0-G10. Mirrors v7/docs/pipeline/evaluation.md. NO_TRADE is a metric/comparator family, not a promotion gate.

G0_doc_ready.description: DOC_READY: Mode has complete docs, contracts, labels, model outputs, and risk rules.

G1_research_backtest.description: RESEARCH_BACKTEST: Initial research backtest with cost-honest labels and no-trade quality.

G2_walk_forward_oos.description: WALK_FORWARD_OOS: Walk-forward out-of-sample evidence across minimum 6 folds.

G3_cost_stress.description: COST_STRESS: Fee, slippage, spread, and funding stress where applicable.

G4_regime_breakdown.description: REGIME_BREAKDOWN: Performance evaluated per TREND_UP, TREND_DOWN, RANGE, TRANSITION.

G5_symbol_stability.description: SYMBOL_STABILITY: No single symbol >40% of total edge; no cluster >60%.

G6_calibration_reliability.description: CALIBRATION_RELIABILITY: Probability and expected-R surfaces calibrated enough for policy gates.

G7_shadow.description: SHADOW: Live-market observation without order placement.

G8_paper.description: PAPER: Paper trading with runtime lifecycle and outcome reconciliation.

G9_tiny_live.description: TINY_LIVE: Small real-capital live validation with strict kill switches.

G10_live.description: LIVE: Production-eligible mode after independent promotion.

recommended_status.description: AlphaForge recommendation. V7 is NOT bound by this.

blocked_scopes.description: Scopes explicitly blocked/not covered by this package.

lineage.description: Full provenance chain from raw data to handoff.

rejection_rules_applied.description: Which rejection rules were evaluated and passed before handoff.
